The '''''Raw Deal''''' was a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] belonging to [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] entrepreneur and casino owner [[Dunari]].

The yacht was the venue of a meeting between Dunari and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] delegates pm ''[[Saloon]]'' shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], in order to arrange supplying procedures.

During the meeting the yacht came under attack from both [[Vulture (Marauder-class)|pirates]] and [[Omicron 023|Imperial]] forces. Fortunately, the covert operations [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Bandit Squadron]] were on hand to defend it.

The ship escaped the assault against ''[[Dunari's Rest]]'' by the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] and ''[[Lament]]'', having on board Dunari and [[Emon Azzameen]].
